questions.question: Explain the role of the Analysis phase in ARIES
keyPoints: Identifies dirty pages and active transactions
Reconstructs transaction table and dirty page table

questions.question: Differentiate between physical and logical logging
Describe the complete ARIES recovery process with checkpoint considerations
keyPoints: Checkpoint contains active transactions and dirty pages
Analysis phase starts from last checkpoint
Redo replays from oldest dirty page LSN
Undo phase uses CLRs for transaction rollback
